mano_cua.result_summary: 右键节点打开饼状菜单后，点击菜单中的端口（element/selector）不会启动连线创建流程。菜单保持打开，无连线拖拽视觉反馈，端口点击无功能效果。bug确认：端口菜单项的click事件未触发edge创建逻辑。另观察到节点图标在菜单打开时持续动画切换（疑似额外视觉bug）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tested right-click on startButton node - circular context menu opened showing selector(input) and element(output) ports. Clicked element port multiple times - menu remained open, no edge creation initiated. Clicked selector port - same result. Dragged from port to canvas - no edge created. Central menu icon changes on port click (gear→arrow→gear) suggesting some internal state change, but no visible edge creation follows. Bug confirmed: port click in node context menu does not create new edge.
